aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.welcomeDesc: Your trusted digital marketplace for all your shopping needs. We connect buyers with quality vendors, offering a seamless shopping experience with secure transactions and reliable delivery.
aboutUs.trustedMarketplaceDesc: Connecting buyers with verified local and international vendors
aboutUs.communityFirstDesc: Building a thriving community of sellers and shoppers
aboutUs.secureShoppingDesc: Your transactions and data are always protected
aboutUs.wideSelectionDesc: Thousands of products across multiple categories
aboutUs.missionP1: At SyriaMall, we believe in empowering local businesses and providing customers with access to quality products at competitive prices. Our platform serves as a bridge between talented vendors and discerning shoppers.
aboutUs.missionP2: We are committed to fostering a safe, transparent, and efficient marketplace where everyone can thrive. Whether you're a vendor looking to expand your reach or a customer seeking the perfect product, SyriaMall is here to serve you.

contactUs.title: Contact Us
contactUs.subtitle: Have a question or need assistance? We're here to help! Reach out to us through any of the channels below or fill out the contact form.
contactUs.faqDesc: Find quick answers to common questions in our Help Center.
contactUs.subject: Subject
contactUs.messagePlaceholder: Tell us more about your inquiry...
contactUs.messageSent: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.

helpCenter.title: How can we help you?
helpCenter.subtitle: Find answers to common questions or get in touch with our support team.
helpCenter.returnsRefundsDesc: Return policy, how to return items
helpCenter.contactSupportDesc: Get in touch with our team
helpCenter.faq1q: How do I track my order?
helpCenter.faq1a: You can track your order by going to 'My Orders' in your account dashboard. Click on any order to see its current status and tracking information. You'll also receive email updates as your order progresses.
helpCenter.faq2q: What payment methods do you accept?
helpCenter.faq2a: We accept various payment methods including credit/debit cards (Visa, MasterCard), bank transfers, and cash on delivery (COD) for eligible orders. Payment options may vary based on your location.
helpCenter.faq3a: Delivery times vary by location and shipping method. Standard delivery typically takes 3-7 business days, while express delivery is available for 1-2 business days in major cities. You can see estimated delivery times at checkout.
helpCenter.faq4a: We offer a 14-day return policy for most items. Products must be unused, in original packaging, and with all tags attached. Some categories like personal care items may have different policies. Visit our Returns page for full details.
helpCenter.faq5q: How do I change or cancel my order?
helpCenter.faq5a: You can modify or cancel your order within 1 hour of placing it by going to 'My Orders' and selecting the order. After this window, please contact our support team for assistance.
helpCenter.faq6q: How do I become a vendor on SyriaMall?
helpCenter.faq6a: To become a vendor, click on 'Sell on SyriaMall' in the header or visit our 'Become a Vendor' page. Complete the application form with your business details, and our team will review your application within 2-3 business days.
helpCenter.faq7a: Yes, we take security seriously. All personal and payment information is encrypted using industry-standard SSL technology. We never share your data with third parties without your consent. Read our Privacy Policy for more details.
helpCenter.faq8q: How do I contact customer support?
helpCenter.faq8a: You can reach our support team through multiple channels: Live chat (available 9 AM - 9 PM), email at support@syriamall.com, or through our Contact Us page. We typically respond within 24 hours.
helpCenter.noResults: No results found for "{{query}}". Try a different search term.
helpCenter.stillNeedHelpDesc: Our customer support team is here to assist you with any questions or concerns.

trackOrder.cantFindOrder: Can't find your order? <1>Contact us</1> for assistance.

shippingInfo.title: Shipping Information
shippingInfo.subtitle: Fast, reliable delivery to your doorstep. Learn about our shipping options and policies.
shippingInfo.standardDesc: Our most economical option for non-urgent deliveries.
shippingInfo.expressDesc: Fast delivery for when you need your items quickly.
shippingInfo.sameDayDesc: Available in select cities for orders placed before 12 PM.
shippingInfo.orderProcessingDesc: Orders are processed within 1-2 business days. Orders placed on weekends or holidays will be processed the next business day.
shippingInfo.orderTrackingDesc: Once your order ships, you'll receive a confirmation email with tracking information. You can also track your order in your account dashboard.
shippingInfo.deliveryAttemptsDesc: Our courier will attempt delivery up to 3 times. If unsuccessful, the package will be held at a nearby pickup point for 7 days.
shippingInfo.deliveryRestrictionsDesc: Some areas may have limited delivery options due to logistical constraints. Delivery availability will be confirmed at checkout.

returns.title: Returns & Refunds
returns.subtitle: Easy returns, hassle-free refunds. We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase.
returns.step1Desc: Go to 'My Orders', select the order, and click 'Request Return' for the item you want to return.
returns.step2Desc: Pack the item securely in its original packaging with all tags and accessories included.
returns.step3Desc: Choose a convenient pickup time or drop off at a designated location.
returns.step4Desc: Once we receive and inspect the item, your refund will be processed within 5-7 business days.
returns.refundQ1: How long does it take to receive my refund?
returns.refundA1: Once we receive your returned item, we'll inspect it within 2-3 business days. After approval, refunds are processed within 5-7 business days. The time it takes for the refund to appear in your account depends on your payment method.
returns.refundQ2: What if my item arrived damaged?
returns.refundA2: If your item arrived damaged, please contact us within 48 hours of delivery with photos of the damage. We'll arrange a free pickup and provide a full refund or replacement at no additional cost.
returns.refundQ3: Can I exchange an item instead of returning it?
returns.refundA3: Yes! If you'd like a different size, color, or variant, you can request an exchange. Simply select "Exchange" instead of "Return" when initiating your request. Exchanges are subject to availability.
returns.refundA4: For defective or damaged items, we cover all return shipping costs. For change-of-mind returns, a small return shipping fee may apply, which will be deducted from your refund amount.
returns.needHelpReturnDesc: Our customer support team is ready to assist you with any return or refund questions.
